# uedit Upstream

This directory contains a vendored source snapshot of uedit, maintained by
Joseph Stewart in a separate repository.

Repository: add upstream repository URL
Imported commit: not yet recorded

## Updating

1. Record the upstream repository and imported commit above.
2. Replace or merge `uedit.h` from upstream.
3. Preserve PULP integration outside this directory.
4. Build and test the native `mini-skred` executable on supported terminals.
